activities_projects.title: Even–Odd Pattern Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Explore patterns when adding even and odd numbers
steps: Write five pairs of even numbers and add them
Write five pairs of odd numbers and add them
Write your observation about the results
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands patterns in even and odd number addition

activities_projects.title: Multiples Comparison Chart
steps: Choose two numbers such as 4 and 6

activities_projects.title: Number Expression Exploration
steps: Calculate the result and compare patterns

activities_projects.title: Parity Rule Activity
steps: Multiply one even and one odd number

activities_projects.title: Always–Sometimes–Never Classification
steps: Test the statements using different numbers
Classify them as always true, sometimes true or never true

activities_projects.title: Common Factor Chart
steps: Choose three numbers such as 12, 18 and 24

activities_projects.title: Number Puzzle Creation
activities_projects.objective: Create puzzles based on number properties
steps: Create three puzzles involving even or odd numbers
Solve them and explain the answers

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Number Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Apply number concepts to daily life
steps: Observe numbers used in daily life such as dates or house numbers
Explain the mathematical rule behind them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects number patterns with real-life situations
